files.description: Main Stripe API client with typed methods for charges and customers
Data models for Stripe API responses
files.code:
public record Charge(string Id, int Amount, string Currency, string Status);
public record Customer(string Id, string Email, string Name);

authenticationSetup:
1. Get your API key from the Stripe Dashboard → Developers → API keys.
2. Store the secret key in an environment variable: STRIPE_SECRET_KEY.
3. Pass it to the StripeClient constructor: new StripeClient(Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable("STRIPE_SECRET_KEY")!).
nextStepSuggestion: Generate unit tests for your new Stripe wrapper.
nextStepDescription: Your Stripe wrapper has methods for creating charges and managing customers. The Unit Test Generator can create comprehensive tests covering happy paths, error handling, and edge cases.
